content: The working memory capacity limits that constrain an AI agent's reasoning act as a built-in 'curiosity filter' for the agent's own exploratory active learning loop. Instead of viewing working memory limits as a purely harmful constraint, they force the agent to prioritize encoding only the most surprising, high-information new experiences that align with its curiosity-driven exploration goals.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
